name:
ORDINARY TIME 03 [B]
WORD OF GOD Sunday

readings.summary: Jesus begins his ministry in Galilee, calls the Apostles.

antiphons.text:
O sing a new song to the Lord;
sing to the Lord, all the earth.
In his presence are majesty and splendor,
strength and honor in his holy place.

Look toward the Lord and be radiant;
let your faces not be abashed.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Jn 8:12

prelude.title: The Word Became Flesh
prelude.description: Word of God Sunday - Post Christmas (Incarnation)
